typecheck-backend.note: Success: no issues found in 12 source files

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Frontend Dev Server' section to architecture.md documenting that vite.config.ts sets the dev port to 5199 (not the Vite default 5173). Added 'Frontend Fetch Timeout' section documenting that FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS = 300_000 is used globally and how to override it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Step 7 (Manual Verification) to reference the correct dev server port. The current text says 'Start the dev server: cd frontend && npm run dev (port 5173)' but services.yaml documents port 5199 and vite.config.ts configures this explicitly. Change to: 'Start the dev server: cd frontend && npm run dev (see services.yaml for the configured port — currently 5199)'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During health-status-indicator verification, the worker spent 3 tool calls finding a working port: tried 5199 (crashed due to conflict), tried 5199 --strictPort (failed), succeeded on 5205. The skill's port 5173 reference is stale.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an exemption clause to Step 3 (Write Tests First / TDD) for lockfile-only updates: 'If the task is a lockfile-only update with no source code changes, skip TDD. Instead, verify by inspecting the lockfile diff and re-running all validators.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During update-ypricemagic, the worker correctly skipped TDD (no code path changed) but had to explicitly justify the deviation in their handoff. The skill currently has no carve-out for this case.
